title: CADO Card Usage
description: Where can the CADO gift card and vouchers be used both in physical stores and online?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive list of merchants, categories, and locations that accept CADO gift cards and cheques, including the ability to view them on a map or search by area (e.g., near a postal code). Relevant information includes official partner outlets, online retailers, and any filters by sector such as fashion, gastronomy, culture, etc. Documents that provide the CADO partner network, map interface, or usage instructions satisfy this need.

title: Lamb Tajine Recipe
description: How can I prepare an authentic Moroccan lamb tajine, including ingredients, preparation steps, and cooking times?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed, authentic Moroccan lamb tajine recipe that lists all required ingredients (e.g., lamb pieces, olive oil, saffron, olives, celery, spices), provides step‑by‑step preparation instructions, and specifies cooking durations and techniques (e.g., browning, simmering, steaming in a conical tajine). Relevant documents are those that describe the recipe, ingredient proportions, cooking method, and any cultural or flavor notes related to North African lamb tajine.

title: Lotus Elise pricing
description: What is the current market price range for a used Lotus Elise in France?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the price of used Lotus Elise vehicles available in the French market. Relevant documents should include listings, price ranges, mileage, condition descriptions, and any valuation tools (e.g., Argus) for used Lotus Elise cars. Sources that only discuss the new‑car price or unrelated Lotus models are not relevant.

title: Baked Veal Paupiettes
description: What is a complete, step‑by‑step recipe for baked veal paupiettes with onions, Paris mushrooms, and optional creamy or wine‑based sauce?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed cooking guide that includes ingredient quantities, preparation steps, oven temperature and timing, and serving suggestions for baked veal paupiettes. Relevant information should cover the base recipe (onion, mushrooms, broth), optional variations such as adding cream, white wine, or herbs, and tips from user comments on flavor adjustments. Documents describing the recipe, cooking technique, and user‑generated modifications are all considered relevant.

title: Outdoor Car Protection
description: What are the best methods to protect a vehicle that is parked outdoors year‑round, and can solar‑tinted window film be used safely and legally for this purpose?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive guide for preserving a car that remains outside permanently. Relevant information must cover general protective measures such as parking in shade, avoiding trees, keeping the fuel tank full, preventing rodent damage, maintaining the battery and brakes, and managing moisture. In addition, the user wants to know whether applying self‑tinted solar film to the windows is permissible under current legislation, what transparency (VL​T) requirements apply, and how the film contributes to UV protection, heat reduction, and overall vehicle longevity. Documents that discuss outdoor car‑care tips and those that detail solar film legality, specifications, and benefits are considered relevant.

title: Small Boat Apparel
description: What women's clothing and accessories are included in Petit Bateau’s Small Boat collection and what are their main style and material characteristics?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of the Petit Bateau Small Boat line for women, including categories such as dresses, T‑shirts, sweaters, jackets, underwear, sleepwear, swimwear, and accessories. Relevant information must describe each product type, highlight the casual‑chic aesthetic, mention key materials (e.g., organic cotton, waterproof wax, wool‑linen), and note any seasonal or special‑occasion styling cues. Only sources that detail items belonging to the Small Boat collection and their defining features satisfy the need.

title: Renault Employee Pricing
description: How can a private consumer obtain Renault employee‑discount prices and what are the conditions and limitations?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on ways to purchase a new or nearly‑new Renault at the same price that Renault staff receive, including services that negotiate employee‑level discounts, the eligibility criteria, contract terms (e.g., lease‑with‑purchase, insurance, financing), any guarantees or refunds, and how these offers compare to buying directly from a Renault dealer or a Renault employee. Relevant documents should discuss discount percentages, the negotiation process, required documentation, and any restrictions such as warranty extensions, delivery costs, or customization limits.

title: War School ebook purchase
description: How can I buy and receive an e‑book from the School of War, including format options, payment methods, and delivery details?
narrative: The user seeks a complete guide to purchasing a War School e‑book: which file formats are offered (epub2, mobi, azw3), how to place an order, the accepted payment methods (credit card via Société Générale), account creation, and any post‑purchase delivery or download instructions. Relevant passages are those describing ebook formats, ordering workflow, payment security, and order fulfillment.

title: Option vs Reload
description: When can a jobseeker choose the right of option rather than simply reloading their Pôle Emploi benefits, and what are the exact eligibility requirements and consequences?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive guidance on distinguishing the right of option from the standard reloadable rights for French unemployment benefits. Relevant documents must explain the eligibility thresholds (e.g., at least 910 hours/130 days of work, allowance limits of €20 per day or a 30 % increase), the procedural steps to request the option, the 21‑day decision window, and the trade‑off of forfeiting existing rights. Documents that describe the general reloadable‑rights rules, the time‑limits for claim filing, and the impact of different legislative dates (pre‑Nov 2019 vs post‑Nov 2019) are also pertinent. Only sources covering these criteria and the practical implications of exercising the option versus continuing with the original allowance are considered relevant.

title: AXA Contract Verification
description: How can I verify that a disclaimer notice from AXA France regarding a life or supplementary pension insurance contract is legitimate and not a fraud?
narrative: The user wants authoritative information on how to confirm the authenticity of a contract disclaimer received from AXA, including which official AXA channels to use, what legal references (e.g., Eckert Act, Sapin II) apply, and the recommended steps if the notice is fraudulent. Relevant documents should describe AXA’s procedures for handling disclaimer communications, contact methods for advisors, and guidance on detecting fraud.

title: Electric Car Incentives
description: What financial aids, price ranges, and battery warranty terms affect the total cost of buying an electric vehicle in France?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information to assess the affordability of an electric car, including list prices of various models, applicable government and regional subsidies (green bonus, conversion premium, retrofit premium, used‑vehicle bonus), eligibility criteria (income thresholds, vehicle age, CO2 limits), and details of battery guarantees (duration, mileage, minimum capacity). Relevant documents must describe these monetary figures, conditions for receiving each aid, and how battery warranty terms influence long‑term ownership costs.

title: Baking Soda Mildew
description: What is the proper recipe and application method for using bicarbonate to control downy mildew on potatoes and tomatoes?
narrative: The user seeks detailed, practical guidance on using sodium bicarbonate (baking soda) as a fungicidal treatment for downy mildew (late blight) affecting potato and tomato crops. Relevant information must include the recommended concentration (e.g., 1 tablespoon per litre of water), mixing instructions, any suggested additives to improve leaf adherence, the method of application (spraying, timing relative to rain or humidity), safety considerations (edible, non‑toxic, biodegradable), and evidence of effectiveness. Documents that describe these preparation steps, usage tips, and the advantages of bicarbonate for disease control are considered relevant.

title: Monique Mathieu Channeling
description: What are the origins, content, and credibility of Monique Mathieu’s channeling messages about the Great Change and the “Brothers of Light”?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on Monique Mathieu’s claimed channeling experiences, including the original texts (e.g., the “Children of the Earth” passage), the websites where they are published (such as ducielalaterre.org and legrandchangement.com), background on her personal history, and assessments of the messages’ authenticity from both supportive New‑Age sources and critical/skeptical analyses. Relevant results should contain primary source material, biographical details, and credible commentary that addresses the spiritual claims and any controversy surrounding her.

title: La Folle Streaming
description: Where can I watch the full movie La Folle Histoire de l'Espace online in French (VF), preferably for free?
narrative: The user is looking for a source that provides the complete film La Folle Histoire de l'Espace (Spaceballs) in French, ideally without cost. Relevant documents must describe or link to a streaming/download site that offers the full movie in VF, give instructions for accessing the film, or reference legitimate platforms where the film can be viewed in French. Pages that only mention the title without access information, or that discuss unrelated content, are not relevant.

title: Season 6 Plans
description: Is a sixth season or reboot of Le Bureau des légendes confirmed, and what have the creators and actors said about its future?
narrative: The user is looking for any information indicating whether a sixth season of the French spy series Le Bureau des légendes (The Office of Legends) will be produced or rebooted. Relevant passages should include statements from lead actor Mathieu Kassovitz, series creator Éric Rochant, Canal+ executives, or other official sources about the status of season 6, possible US adaptations, and the series' announced conclusion. Documents that merely discuss earlier seasons, plot details, or unrelated awards are not relevant.

title: Prévaloir Etymology
description: What are the origins, historical development, and current meanings of the French verb prévaloir?
narrative: The user wants a detailed account of the word prévaloir, including its Latin root, earliest attestations in French texts, semantic shifts over time, and illustrative literary examples. Relevant material should discuss etymology, historical usage notes, dictionary definitions, and quoted passages that show how the verb has been employed from the 15th century to the present.

title: Rendez‑vous Episodes
description: Which episodes of the French TV programme “Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu” (hosted by Raphaël de Casabianca) feature visits to remote communities, and where can they be streamed or downloaded?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive list of episodes that highlight the show’s core concept – a celebrity traveling to an unknown, often isolated region and meeting local inhabitants. Relevant results must include the episode number or title, the guest celebrity, the country or community visited, the original broadcast date on France 2, and any available streaming or download links (e.g., France TV app, official YouTube channel). Sources that merely mention the programme without episode‑level details, or that provide unrelated biographical information about the host, are not considered relevant.

title: Diarrhea Nutrition
description: What foods and drinks should be eaten or avoided during an episode of diarrhea to aid recovery?
narrative: The user wants practical dietary guidance for managing acute diarrhea, including which vegetables, fruits, starches, proteins, fats, dairy products, and fluids are recommended, how to prepare them, and which items should be excluded because they worsen symptoms. Relevant documents are those that provide specific food‑and‑beverage recommendations, portion advice, and rationale for each choice.

title: Paris Event Venue
description: What large event spaces are available for rent in Paris that can accommodate corporate conferences or exhibitions?
narrative: The user is looking for rental venues in Paris suitable for hosting sizable professional events such as conferences, trade shows, or exhibitions. Relevant documents should describe venues with substantial capacity (e.g., several hundred attendees), provide details on available facilities (auditoriums, meeting rooms, catering options), location within Paris, contact information, and any notable statistics (e.g., total area, number of past events). Documents that merely mention unrelated services or small meeting rooms are not relevant.

title: Dynamic Green Electricity
description: How do E.Leclerc Energies and Urban Solar Energy electricity plans compare regarding dynamic pricing, renewable sourcing, and subscription fees?
narrative: The user is looking for information that details and contrasts the two electricity supplier offerings. Relevant documents must describe each provider's pricing model (e.g., market‑price kWh with a fixed subscription versus any fixed‑rate or green tariff), the extent to which the electricity is sourced from renewables, any mobile or smart‑meter tools for controlling consumption, and any associated subscription or service charges. Documents that only mention unrelated services or lack detail on pricing, renewable content, or fees are not relevant.

title: Kia EV Offer Bordeaux
description: What are the current pricing, promotions, and availability of the Kia e‑Niro electric vehicle at Edenauto Kia Bordeaux?
narrative: The user intends to buy a Kia electric vehicle from the Edenauto Kia dealership in Bordeaux and needs up‑to‑date information on the Kia e‑Niro, including its MSRP, any limited‑time discounts (e.g., offers valid until 30 June 2022), stock status, and the dealer's after‑sales service hours. Relevant results should contain details about the e‑Niro price, promotional deadlines, availability at the Bordeaux location, the dealer’s opening hours for sales and service, and recent customer feedback that reflects the purchasing experience.

title: Gallic Ancestry Origins
description: What historical and historiographic evidence supports the claim that modern French people descend from the Gauls, and how has this idea changed over time?
narrative: The user wants sources that examine archaeological, linguistic, and historical data on the continuity between ancient Gaulish populations and present‑day French, as well as the development of the ‘our ancestors were Gauls’ narrative in education, nationalism, and popular culture. Relevant material should discuss the composition of Gaulish tribes, their cultural legacy, and the evolution of the Gallic ancestry myth.

title: Faro Budget Rental
description: What is the cheapest car rental in Faro that includes insurance and a toll‑payment device without hidden extra charges?
narrative: The user plans a week‑long stay in the Algarve and wants to pick up a car at Faro Airport at the lowest daily rate, but only rentals that bundle mandatory insurance and provide a toll‑payment badge are acceptable. Documents mentioning per‑day price, insurance coverage, toll‑device provision, and customer feedback about hidden fees or poor service are considered relevant.

title: Europcar Nantes Pricing
description: What is the average daily cost to rent an economy‑class car from Europcar at the Nantes South Station (Gare Sud) location?
narrative: The user is looking for information on the typical price per day for a standard economy vehicle (e.g., Peugeot 208, Renault Clio) at the Europcar agency situated at Nantes Gare Sud. Relevant documents should mention the average daily rate (approximately €45), the car class included, and any basic conditions that affect the price such as fuel policy or minimum rental period.

title: Fry-Resistant Variety
description: Which potato varieties combine resistance to downy mildew with high suitability for French fry production?
narrative: The user seeks potato cultivars that are both resistant to downy mildew (or similar major fungal diseases) and possess traits ideal for French fries, such as firm, high‑starch flesh. Relevant information includes specific variety names, their disease resistance profiles, and culinary qualities for fry processing. A variety is relevant only if it satisfies both criteria; varieties lacking either disease resistance or fry‑appropriate characteristics are not relevant.

title: Aging Beaujolais Crus
description: Which Beaujolais crus are suitable for cellaring and what are the recommended aging periods for each?
narrative: The user wants detailed guidance on the aging potential of the ten Beaujolais crus (Morgon, Régnié, Moulin‑à‑Vent, Côte de Brouilly, Brouilly, Juliénas, Saint‑Amour, Chénas, Chiroubles, Fleurie). Relevant information should describe each cru’s terroir, typical taste profile, and how long the wines can be stored before reaching peak quality, including specific aging windows and factors influencing longevity. Documents that only cover general Beaujolais history, geography, or tourism without addressing aging suitability are not relevant.

title: Men Boat Shoe Guide
description: What are the key features, cleaning methods, and purchase options for men's boat shoes offered by TBS?
narrative: The user seeks a thorough overview of TBS men's boat shoes, including style variations, material (full leather vs. nubuck), technical attributes such as slip‑resistant soles and waterproofing, recommended cleaning and maintenance procedures, price ranges, and available delivery and return policies. Relevant passages should explain these product details, care instructions, and buying conditions.

title: Renault EV Lease
description: What are the total costs, mileage limits, and eco‑bonus deductions for leasing a Renault Twingo E‑Tech electric versus a Renault Zoe electric over a 37‑month contract?
narrative: The user wants to compare leasing options for two Renault fully electric models (Twingo E‑Tech and Zoe) that are offered with 37‑month long‑term rental agreements. Relevant information must include the monthly payment, first‑rent amount, any eco‑bonus or conversion premium deductions, maximum allowed kilometres, and any additional conditions (e.g., maintenance packages, required vehicle scrappage). Documents that detail the lease terms, pricing tables, and bonus calculations for each model are considered relevant.

title: Corfu Car Rental Deals
description: What are the most affordable car rental options in Corfu that include free cancellation and unlimited mileage?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Corfu and wants to rent a car at the lowest possible price while also having the flexibility of free cancellation and the convenience of unlimited mileage. Relevant information includes price ranges for different car categories, agencies that regularly offer the cheapest rates (e.g., Auto Europe, eDreams, Govoyages), which companies provide free‑cancellation policies (e.g., Sixt, Argus Car Hire, Holiday Autos), and which agencies include unlimited mileage in their offers (e.g., Rent&Go, AcaRent, Sixt, Enterprise). Documents that list agency locations, price examples, and the mentioned features are considered relevant.

title: Reunion Car Rental
description: What car rental services are available for tourists arriving at Réunion Island, and what are their prices, pickup options, and included amenities?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about car‑rental providers on Réunion Island, including locations (airport, hotel, or local agencies), pricing structures, unlimited mileage, insurance coverage, free services such as airport transfers, additional driver allowances, child‑seat provision, and vehicle types. Documents that describe rental agencies, their service offerings, reservation processes, and any special benefits (e.g., free baby seats, 24‑hour support) are considered relevant.

title: Used Hybrid SUV
description: What used hybrid SUVs are available for sale in Switzerland under CHF 50,000 with mileage below 80,000 km?
narrative: The user is looking for listings of second‑hand hybrid sport‑utility vehicles on the Swiss AutoScout24 marketplace. Relevant documents must describe a vehicle that is (1) classified as a SUV or similar (e.g., Kombi, Crossover), (2) equipped with a hybrid powertrain, (3) located in Switzerland, (4) priced at or below CHF 50,000, and (5) has accumulated no more than 80,000 km. Information about the model year (e.g., 2018‑2022) and brand may be mentioned but is not required. Documents that describe non‑hybrid, gasoline‑only, diesel‑only, fully electric, non‑SUV, or vehicles outside the price or mileage limits are not relevant.

title: Accident Law Comparison
description: How does the portrayal of road accidents in the film *Mad Max* compare to the French compensation system under the Badinter law?
narrative: The user wants to understand both the cinematic depiction of road accidents (e.g., chase scenes, injuries, fatalities) in *Mad Max* and the real‑world legal framework for compensating road accident victims in France. Relevant documents must provide details about the Badinter law, compensation scales (disability, aesthetic prejudice, loss of chance, etc.), and examples of road‑accident injuries, as well as descriptions of the road‑related incidents, injuries, and consequences depicted in the film.

title: Arkéa Arena Access
description: What are the accessibility options and reservation procedures for events at the Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information on how to book tickets or parking for events at the Arkéa Arena, with a focus on services for people with reduced mobility or disabilities, including contact phone numbers, accessibility accommodations, and any special guidance provided by the venue.

title: Women Farmers Letters
description: What letters did women farmers send to Menie Grégoire between 1969 and 1976, and what do they reveal about rural life?
narrative: The user wants to locate original correspondence from the Menie Grégoire fonds (collection 66J) in the Indre‑et‑Loire departmental archives, specifically letters written by women farmers during the broadcast years 1969‑April 1976. Relevant results are any digitised or catalogued letters, envelopes, annotations, or finding‑aid documents that describe the content, dates, authorship, and themes (daily routines, agricultural work, gender issues) of these letters.

title: Energy Bill Dispute
description: What are the steps, required documents, and legal time limits for contesting an electricity or gas bill with a supplier in France?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive guide on how to challenge an energy bill, including the escalation hierarchy (customer service → consumer service → ombudsman), the statutory limitation periods for consumers (5 years) and professionals (2 years), the effect of mediation on the limitation period, and the specific contact details for ENGIE and the National Energy Ombudsman. Relevant passages must describe these procedures, time‑limits, required documentation, and contact channels.

title: Office Desktop Promo
description: What office desktop computers are currently on sale that include a Microsoft 365 Family discount and free shipping?
narrative: The user wants to identify office‑oriented desktop computers advertised on the Darty/Fnac site that are in stock, come with the 40 € immediate discount when purchased together with Microsoft 365 Family, and offer free shipping or in‑store withdrawal. Relevant documents should mention office computers or central units, the promotional discount, pricing, availability, and key specifications such as RAM, SSD size, GPU, and operating system.

title: Photography History Timeline
description: What are the major milestones and inventions in the development of photography from its early optical origins to modern digital cameras?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive chronological overview of photographic technology, covering early optical principles (camera obscura, stenope), chemical processes (heliography, daguerreotype, calotype, early colour methods), mechanical and electro‑mechanical innovations (Leica, flash bulb, Rolleiflex, SLRs, Polaroid, electronic flash), and the transition to digital photography. Relevant material must mention dates, key inventors, and the impact of each breakthrough, effectively providing a timeline or detailed summary of these milestones.

title: Gluten-Free Leek Quiche
description: What is a quick, gluten‑free and dairy‑free leek quiche recipe that can be prepared in under 45 minutes?
narrative: The user seeks a recipe for a leeks‑based quiche that satisfies three constraints: (1) it must be gluten‑free, (2) it must be dairy‑free, and (3) the total preparation and cooking time must not exceed 45 minutes. Relevant documents should describe a quiche using leeks as the primary vegetable, provide ingredient lists with suitable gluten‑free flour or crust alternatives and dairy substitutes (e.g., plant‑based milk/cream), and give clear timing for prep and bake. Recipes lacking any of these criteria—such as those containing wheat dough, cheese, butter, or exceeding the time limit—are not relevant.

title: Free Car Game Comparison
description: What are the best free online car games that combine realistic driving with stunt features?
narrative: The user wants a curated list of free, browser‑based car games that offer both realistic racing (e.g., physics, vehicle customization) and stunt or demolition modes, preferably with multiplayer options and no required download. Relevant documents should describe games that match these criteria, such as titles from CrazyGames, Madalin Stunt Cars 2, Drift Hunters, and similar platforms, and provide enough detail to assess their suitability.

title: Mobility Aid Eligibility
description: What are the eligibility criteria for a Pôle emploi jobseeker to receive mobility assistance for travel to a job interview or training?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive answer describing who can obtain mobility assistance, including required distance (e.g., >60 km round‑trip or >2 hours), contract type (CDI, CDD, temporary contract of ≥3 months), income limits (receiving unemployment benefit at or below the ARE threshold), and any other exclusions. The response should also cover required documentation, application timing (before the interview or within 7 days after), covered expenses (travel, accommodation, meals), reimbursement rates and annual ceilings, and the option to use SNCF vouchers. Only documents that address these criteria and procedures are considered relevant.

title: SFR Account Recovery
description: How can I reset my SFR client‑area password and regain access to my account?
narrative: The user needs a step‑by‑step guide for recovering access to the SFR (or Prixtel) client portal after forgetting the password. Relevant information includes the process for requesting a password reset, receiving and following the reset e‑mail, entering verification codes sent by SMS or voice call, linking an e‑mail to the account if required, and subsequently logging in to view invoices or other services. Documents that describe these procedures, error handling, and related login instructions are considered relevant.

title: Oil Lamp Restoration
description: What are the best practices and resources for restoring a vintage oil lamp, including replacing its glass, wick, and spout?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive guidance on restoring a historic oil lamp: step‑by‑step instructions, historical context from old manuals, and recommendations for sourcing authentic or compatible replacement parts such as glass globes, wicks, and spouts. Relevant documents are those that describe the original oil‑lamp and alcohol‑stove manuals (providing historical usage and maintenance information) and commercial listings that sell replacement components and offer how‑to tutorials. Documents that only market modern lamps without restoration detail or that lack part‑specific information are not relevant.

title: Cheap Madeira Rental
description: When is the cheapest time to rent a car in Madeira and what are the requirements for doing so?
narrative: The user is planning a visit to Madeira and wants to minimize car‑rental costs. They need information about which months offer the lowest daily rates and the typical booking volume for those periods, as well as practical rental conditions such as required credit cards, driver‑age limits, necessary documentation (e.g., driving licence), and any optional equipment or insurance considerations. Relevant documents must provide month‑by‑month price averages, popularity statistics, and details on rental policies for Madeira.

title: Sprouted New Potatoes
description: How can I safely prepare a dish using early (new) potatoes that have started to sprout?
narrative: The user wants a cooking method and recipe for new/early potatoes that may have sprouts, while also needing safety guidance on removing sprouts and avoiding solanine toxicity; relevant documents must address both the culinary technique (e.g., sautéed/rissolée) and health precautions for sprouted potatoes.

title: Return to Work Bonus
description: What are the current eligibility requirements, claim procedure, and timing for receiving the French return‑to‑work bonus, especially when the employment period is only one month?
narrative: The user seeks authoritative information on the French "prime de retour à l'emploi" (return‑to‑work bonus). Relevant documents must explain whether the bonus still exists, the specific conditions for eligibility (e.g., receipt of RSA/SSA/DDA, minimum hours per month, contract type and length, required four‑month work period or possible early payment after one month), the amount (€1,000), how often it can be paid, and the exact steps to apply (required forms, supporting documents, contact points such as CAF or Pôle Emploi). Documents that discuss rule changes over time, contradictory claims, or real‑world examples of successful or denied claims are considered relevant, while unrelated discussions about unrelated benefits or personal anecdotes without policy detail are not.
